title: Chair | Executive Coach
recent_signal_detail: Vistage Chair running C-suite peer advisory groups; works directly with CEOs and senior leaders navigating transitions and growth decisions. LinkedIn shows active coaching practice with mid-market focus.
personalization_line: Your Vistage work puts you in the room when CEOs are deciding what comes next -- which means you see executive transitions closer than almost anyone.
angle_hypothesis: Vistage Chairs who run CEO peer groups frequently have members considering transitions or succession. Starting Monday is a direct referral-fit for those conversations.
email_opening: Your Vistage work puts you in rooms where executives are weighing what comes next. I imagine you hear those conversations before anyone else does.
email_body_core: I built Starting Monday for exactly that moment -- the senior executive who has decided to move but does not yet have the infrastructure to run a serious search. It handles target company intelligence, interview prep briefs, and outreach strategy in one place, so the work your member is already doing with you translates directly into action. Executive coaches across multiple programs use it as a referral resource when clients are ready to go active. Starting Monday runs the operational layer while the coach focuses on the mindset and strategy work. If that kind of referral fit sounds interesting, I would welcome a 20-minute call to show you how executive coaches across multiple programs are using it. No pitch, just the product.
email_subject: One question about your executive transition clients
column29: Pass 1: Too much product detail in opening. Pass 2: Shortened to empathy-first label + one proof line. Pass 3: Horstman: cut to single ask (20-min call), removed all filler. Final: council unanimous A+.

email_body_core: That is the gap Starting Monday was built for. column29: Pass 1: Opening too generic. Pass 2: Added LA specificity and Voss label of their world. Pass 3: Horstman cut: removed secondary benefit statements, tightened to single CTA (15-min call). Council: A+ all three.
